results.description: S3 bucket has acl set to public-read.
results.impact: The bucket's contents can be read by any unauthenticated user.
results.resolution: Set acl = "private" and use bucket policies for narrow access.

results.description: IAM policy document uses wildcard actions.
results.impact: Overly permissive policy grants unintended access.
results.resolution: Replace "*" with specific IAM actions scoped to the task.

results.description: Security group allows ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22.
results.impact: SSH accessible to the entire internet.
results.resolution: Restrict cidr_blocks to known admin CIDRs or use a bastion/SSM Session Manager.

results.description: RDS instance does not have storage_encrypted set.
results.impact: Data at rest is stored unencrypted.
results.resolution: Set storage_encrypted = true on the aws_db_instance resource.
